question_X: Has this work week gone quickly for you?
answer_Y: It's gone very slowly.
question_X_cz: Utekl ti tenhle pracovní týden rychle?

question_X: Do you want me to walk you to your car?
answer_Y: That would be really nice, thanks.
question_X_cz: Chceš, abych tě doprovodil k autu?
answer_Y_cz: To by bylo od tebe moc milé, díky.

question_X: Do you have a date?
answer_Y: I'm meeting my kids.

question_X: Will you be at work tomorrow?
answer_Y: I never work on weekends.

question_X: Are you going out tonight?
answer_Y: I am not
question_X_cz: Chystáš se dneska večer někam ven?

question_X: Want to grab something to eat?
answer_Y: Let's get tacos.

question_X: Want to go get a drink??
answer_Y: I want to have 3 drinks.

question_X: Is it the end of the day already?
answer_Y: It's hard to believe.
question_X_cz: To už je vážně konec pracovní doby?

question_X: Do you have a date?
answer_Y: I have a date with my wife.

question_X: Are you doing something fun this weekend?
answer_Y: We're going to the zoo.

question_X: Got anything going on on Saturday?
answer_Y: I am planting the garden.

question_X: Do you work near by?
answer_Y: We work together.

question_X: Will you be going out at the weekend ?
answer_Y: I'm headed out to the slopes.

question_X: Are you ready for the weekend?
answer_Y: I certainly am

question_X: Will you be in tomorrow?
answer_Y: I don't come back till next week.

question_X: Are you going out this weekend?
answer_Y: I'm going out of town.

question_X: Do you want to walk to the bus stop together?
answer_Y: That would be nice.

question_X: Do you have your keys?
answer_Y: I forgot them upstairs.

question_X: Do you want to hang out later?
answer_Y: I could do with a stiff drink.

question_X: Are you spending time with friends or family over the weekend?
answer_Y: I have too much work to do.
question_X_cz: Budeš o víkendu s rodinou nebo s přáteli?

question_X: Are you doing anything fun tonight?
answer_Y: I'm going to hit the hay early.

question_X: Heading home?
answer_Y: I am off to the horse track.

question_X: Do you have your kids this weekend?
answer_Y: They are at their dad's house.
question_X_cz: Máš tenhle víkend u sebe děti?

question_X: Wanna hang out at the weekend?
answer_Y: I'm going out of town.

question_X: Is your department busy this time of year?
answer_Y: There's not much work.
question_X_cz: Má vaše oddělení v tuhle roční dobu napilno?

question_X: Have you made dinner plans yet?
answer_Y: I have reservations at the new French place.
answer_Y_cz: Mám rezervaci v té nové francouzské restauraci.

question_X: Would hanging out this weekend be something you're into?
answer_Y: I don't think I have time this weekend.
question_X_cz: Chtěl bys o víkendu něco podniknout?
answer_Y_cz: Tenhle víkend mi to asi nevyjde.

question_X: Hey if you're up to it, would you like to hit the gym with me in the morning?
answer_Y: I'm already going to a yoga class.
question_X_cz: Hele, jestli se na to cítíš, nezašel bys se mnou ráno do fitka?

question_X: Have you tried the new restaurant by work?
answer_Y: I haven't, but I've heard good things.
question_X_cz: Už jsi zkusil tu novou restauraci u nás u práce?
answer_Y_cz: Zatím ne, ale slyšel jsem na ni chválu.

question_X: Do you get along with our colleagues?
answer_Y: They're wonderful.

question_X: Do you plan on going home?
answer_Y: I have errands to run first.
answer_Y_cz: Musím si nejdřív ještě něco zařídit.

question_X: Do you have house chores to do this weekend?
answer_Y: I've got to tidy up my kitchen this weekend.
question_X_cz: Čekají tě o víkendu domácí práce?

question_X: Do you find your coworkers pleasant?
answer_Y: I'd say they are very amicable.
answer_Y_cz: Řekl bych, že jsou velmi přátelští.

question_X: Do you want me to walk you to your car?
answer_Y: If you don't mind.
question_X_cz: Chceš, abych tě doprovodil k autu?

question_X: Want to go to the movies?
answer_Y: I'd rather go to the mall.

question_X: Do you have to work your other job this weekend?
answer_Y: I am on holidays.
question_X_cz: Musíš být o víkendu ve své druhé práci?

question_X: Do you have plans for this evening?
answer_Y: I plan to head to the gym tonight.
question_X_cz: Máš na dnešní večer nějaké plány?
answer_Y_cz: Mám v plánu jít dneska do fitka.

question_X: Was work fun?
answer_Y: Work is always a chore.

question_X: How you seen the scooter rentals?
answer_Y: I haven't seen any yet

question_X: Do you have to be home for a certain time?
answer_Y: The joy of being single, my time is my own.
question_X_cz: Musíš být doma na nějakou konkrétní hodinu?
answer_Y_cz: V tom je ta krása, když je člověk nezadaný – můj čas patří jen mně.

question_X: Do you have plans for this weekend?
answer_Y: I'm meeting up with a few friends.

question_X: Do you have dinner plans?
answer_Y: I did but thery were cancelled.
answer_Y_cz: Měl jsem, ale zrušilo se to.

question_X: How you seen the scooter rentals?
answer_Y: I tried one in San Diego -- they're fun.
answer_Y_cz: Zkoušel jsem jednu v San Diegu, je to sranda.

question_X: Are you relieved it's Friday?
answer_Y: I am always happy to see Friday
question_X_cz: Ulevilo se ti, že už je pátek?

question_X: Do you guys want to go get something to eat?
answer_Y: I could grab a bite.

question_X: Hi, are you okay?
answer_Y: I think I just broke my toe.
answer_Y_cz: Asi jsem si zrovna zlomila palec.

question_X: Are the two of you dating now?
answer_Y: We haven't starting dating.

question_X: Are you divorced?
answer_Y: I've never been married.

question_X: Chilly tonight isn't it?
answer_Y: It's January, so that makes sense.
question_X_cz: Dneska večer je celkem chladno, že?
answer_Y_cz: Je leden, tak se není čemu divit.

question_X: Have you been to the new bar in the neighborhood?
answer_Y: I just saw an ad for that place, but I'm not sure where exactly it is.
question_X_cz: Už jsi byl v tom novém baru u nás ve čtvrti?
answer_Y_cz: Zrovna jsem na to viděl reklamu, ale nejsem si jistý, kde přesně to je.

question_X: Have any weekend plans?
answer_Y: I've got nothing on my calendar.

question_X: Are you doing something fun this weekend?
answer_Y: We're going to a spa.

question_X: Do you have any plans for this weekend?
answer_Y: I'm tacking tennis lessons.
question_X_cz: Máš na tenhle víkend nějaké plány?

question_X: Are you going to the gym?
answer_Y: I went yesterday.

question_X: Shall we go for a drink at a bar?
answer_Y: Maybe we could have dinner as well
answer_Y_cz: Možná bychom si k tomu mohli dát i večeři.
